title: Canadian Chickpea Hash
description: A hearty breakfast dish inspired by Canadian cuisine, made with crispy chickpea patties, served with a flavorful hash.
instructions: In a large bowl, mash chickpeas using a fork or a potato masher.
Add diced onion, bell pepper, salt, and black pepper to the bowl. Mix well.
Shape the mixture into 4-6 patties, depending on desired size.
Place the patties on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
While the chickpea patties are baking, cook hash browns in a large skillet over medium heat until crispy.
Crumbles the crispy bacon and set aside.
In a small bowl, beat the eggs and season with salt and black pepper.
Once the chickpea patties are done, remove them from the oven and top each patty with a spoonful of hash browns, a sprinkle of crumbled bacon, and a dollop of beaten eggs.
Return the skillet to the oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes or until the eggs are cooked through.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
Serve with toast or hash browns on the side, if desired.
